title: Portfolio Management — Broker CSV Import, Store, Risk Analysis + 3 Finance Catalysts
context_additions: OCTANE_YOUTUBE_PDF_ARXIV_EXTRACTION_PIPLEINE.md — full spec for YouTube transcript, arXiv, PDF, EPUB extraction pipeline (planned for later session)
swift_build_note: octane-auth binary NOT yet built — source exists at octane-auth/. Run: cd octane-auth && bash build.sh to compile and install to ~/.octane/bin/octane-auth. Required for: octane vault write/read. Not required for any other command.

A.title: octane/portfolio/ Module — Models, Parsers, Store
A.description: Core portfolio domain module. Position dataclass with ticker normalisation and cost_basis property. Portfolio aggregate with tickers, total_cost_basis, by_ticker(). CSV parsers auto-detect broker by header pattern (Fidelity checked before Schwab to avoid 'cost basis' substring collision). parse_csv() and parse_csv_text() public API. PortfolioStore async class using PgClient with upsert_position, upsert_many, list_positions, get_position, delete_position, clear, get_tickers.
A.detection_mechanism: Header string matching ordered most-specific to least-specific to prevent false matches

commands.import: Parse broker CSV and store to Postgres. Options: --broker, --account, --project, --dry-run. Shows preview table before saving.
commands.show: Display stored positions. --prices flag fetches live prices via yfinance and shows market value + P&L per position.
commands.analyze: Build structured context from stored positions and route through OSA orchestrator (same as octane ask). Fallback: prints context + daemon instructions if daemon not running.
commands.risk: Fetch sector info via yfinance, compute per-holding and per-sector weights, flag positions over 10%/20%/30% concentration thresholds.
commands.rebalance: Compute buy/sell deltas to reach target allocation. Supports 'equal' (equal-weight) or 'TICKER:WEIGHT,TICKER:WEIGHT' explicit targets. --investment adds new capital to the calculation.

sector_exposure.output: sector, industry, beta, sector_map (multi-ticker), details list

correlation_analysis.data_source: time_series from upstream agent + extra_series dict + yfinance fallback for instruction tickers
correlation_analysis.output: tickers list, matrix dict[ticker, dict[ticker, float]], summary with plain-English labels (very high / high / moderate / low / negligible)

changes.new_index: UNIQUE INDEX idx_positions_upsert ON portfolio_positions (ticker, broker, account_id)
changes.schema_sql: portfolio_positions CREATE TABLE updated with all 4 new columns + unique index for fresh installs

E.title: Tests — 69 New Tests (portfolio module)

test_breakdown.test_parsers.py: TestCleanNum (6), TestDetectBroker (7), TestSchwebParser (7), TestFidelityParser (3), TestRobinhoodParser (3), TestVanguardParser (2), TestGenericParser (2), TestPositionModel (5) = 35 tests

E.migration_test_updates: test_migrate_noop_when_current updated to feed 3 versions including 29A; test_migrate_applies_when_pending updated to assert result.version == '29A'

F.title: Output Quality, Tier Routing, Chat UX, Structlog Quiet Mode
F.description: Focused on closing the gap between infrastructure and output quality. Wired MID tier (8b) into QueryStrategist and DepthAnalyzer. Removed the code_generation node from comparative_analysis pipeline (evaluator handles synthesis). Added adaptive output length to Evaluator based on query complexity. Suppressed structlog noise by default (WARNING level), verbose opts in. Upgraded octane chat with /deep toggle, timing, word count, topology display.

tier_routing.QueryStrategist: FAST → MID — 8b generates better search variations than 90m
tier_routing.DepthAnalyzer: FAST → MID — 8b produces smarter follow-up research queries
tier_routing.comparative_analysis_pipeline: Removed code_generation node — evaluator (REASON tier) handles comparison synthesis directly, eliminating the 90m JSON planning failure that caused 153s delays

adaptive_output_length.mechanism: _estimate_output_tokens() returns 600-4000 tokens based on query signals
adaptive_output_length.brief_signals: price, stock price, what is, who is → 600 tokens
adaptive_output_length.compare_signals: compare, vs, versus, between X and Y → 3000 tokens
adaptive_output_length.length_hints: System prompt includes explicit length instruction matching query complexity

structlog_quiet.default_log_level: WARNING (was INFO) — clean CLI output by default

chat_improvements.deep_toggle: /deep slash command toggles deep mode mid-conversation
chat_improvements.timing: Response time shown after each answer (e.g. '↳ 142 words · 3.2s')
chat_improvements.topology_display: Shows model name + topology at startup
chat_improvements.verbose_flag: --verbose flag on octane chat enables debug logging
chat_improvements.mode_indicator: Prompt shows (deep) when deep mode is active

files_modified.change: tier=ModelTier.FAST → tier=ModelTier.MID
tier=ModelTier.FAST → tier=ModelTier.MID, updated docstring
Added _estimate_output_tokens(), _length_hint(), is_deep param on evaluate/evaluate_stream, adaptive max_tokens + system prompt, timeout 30→60s
Wired is_deep through to all 3 evaluate/evaluate_stream call sites
comparative_analysis: removed code_generation node, now 2 nodes (fetch A + fetch B)
Added /deep toggle, timing, word count, topology display, --verbose flag, mode indicator in prompt
Added verbose→setup_logging(level_override='debug')
Default log_level changed from INFO to WARNING
setup_logging() now accepts level_override parameter

tests_updated.change: comparative_analysis: 3 nodes → 2 nodes, code_node test → both_nodes_are_web

F.root_cause_of_153s_failure: comparative_analysis pipeline routed to code agent → code planner needed JSON from 90m → 90m can't generate structured JSON → 3 retry loops → 153s thin output. Fix: removed code node entirely, evaluator does the synthesis on REASON tier (37b).

Pairwise correlation matrix from price time-series

Added portfolio import + app.add_typer(portfolio.portfolio_app, name='portfolio')

new_commands.octane portfolio import PATH: Parse a broker CSV and store positions in Postgres
new_commands.octane portfolio import PATH --broker Sc: Override broker detection and tag account
new_commands.octane portfolio show --prices: Show with live prices + P&L (calls yfinance)
new_commands.octane portfolio analyze: LLM-based portfolio analysis via OSA pipeline
new_commands.octane portfolio rebalance --target 'NVD: Rebalance to explicit weights + new capital

architecture_notes.parser_detection: Ordered by specificity — Fidelity (contains 'average cost basis') checked before Schwab (contains 'cost basis per share') to avoid substring false-matches. Generic fallback handles unknown formats by searching common column name variants.
architecture_notes.upsert_key: portfolio_positions uses (ticker, broker, account_id) as the natural upsert key. Same CSV re-import is idempotent.
architecture_notes.catalyst_pattern: All 3 new catalysts follow the existing resolve_data → output_dict pattern. yfinance is imported lazily with ImportError → RuntimeError for clean messages.
architecture_notes.correlation_fallback: correlation_analysis fetches additional ticker history from yfinance when only one time-series is available in resolved_data.
architecture_notes.cli_analyze_fallback: portfolio analyze works even without a running daemon — prints the structured context so the user can copy-paste into octane ask.

session_29B.title: Daemon Inference Re-enablement + .env Path Fix
session_29B.description: Re-enabled daemon as the coordination layer for multi-client inference. Previously bypassed (_daemon_infer returned None) to fix CLI hangs. Root cause of hangs was actually _TeeFile deadlock + asyncio.gather batching, not the daemon itself. With those fixed, daemon routing was safely re-enabled. Also fixed .env loading so Octane works from any cwd.

daemon_inference_routing.description: _daemon_infer() re-enabled with full daemon IPC: DaemonClient connect → request('infer', payload) → parse response. Falls back to direct HTTP on any daemon error. Self-detection guard prevents daemon process from recursing into its own socket.
daemon_inference_routing.architecture: Terminal → Daemon (Unix socket) → InferenceProxy (per-model semaphore) → Bodega HTTP → GPU
daemon_inference_routing.fallback: Any daemon error silently falls through to direct HTTP — zero user-visible degradation
daemon_inference_routing.verified: 5 concurrent clients completed in 3.55s through daemon, pressure report shows idle after drain

env_path_fix.bug: model_config had env_file='.env' (relative) — only worked when cwd was project root. Running 'octane investigate' from ~/ caused bodega_intel_url to default to port 44469 (not running) instead of 44467 (running)
env_path_fix.fix: Anchored .env path to repo root: _REPO_ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent; _ENV_FILE = _REPO_ROOT / '.env'
env_path_fix.symptom: web_search_failed error='All connection attempts failed' when running octane from home directory

topology_cleanup.description: Removed phantom axe-stealth-37b from power topology, replaced with bodega-raptor-8b for REASON tier. CB tuned: cb_completion_batch_size=32, cb_prefill_batch_size=16, num_draft_tokens=5

thinking_disabled.description: enable_thinking: False injected globally into all BodegaInferenceClient payloads — carries through both direct HTTP and daemon paths

streaming_fix.description: asyncio.gather replaced with asyncio.as_completed in both compare.py and investigate.py — cells/findings now stream incrementally instead of arriving all at once

teefile_deadlock_fix.description: _TeeFile now snapshots self._stdout = sys.stdout at __init__ time to prevent infinite recursion when Rich Progress replaces sys.stdout with FileProxy

test_results.note: 1 failure is env-dependent: test_daemon_status_when_not_running fails because daemon IS running (PID 82245)

files_modified.change: _daemon_infer() re-enabled with full IPC + graceful fallback
.env path anchored to repo root via Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent
power REASON = bodega-raptor-8b, CB tuned, axe-stealth-37b removed
REASON fallback prefers lm over multimodal
_TeeFile snapshots sys.stdout at init
kwargs init, done event handler, Progress transient=False
asyncio.gather → asyncio.as_completed
asyncio.gather → asyncio.as_completed
45s asyncio.wait_for timeout

session_30_plan.title: Extraction Pipeline — YouTube, arXiv, PDF, EPUB
session_30_plan.description: Implement the extraction pipeline designed in OCTANE_YOUTUBE_PDF_ARXIV_EXTRACTION_PIPLEINE.md
scope: octane/extractors/ module with models.py (ExtractedDocument, TextChunk, SourceType, ChunkMetadata)
YouTube pipeline: scrapetube search + youtube-transcript-api (v1.2+ instance API) + yt-dlp fallback + mlx-whisper Tier 3
arXiv pipeline: arxiv package search + PDF download
EPUB extraction: ebooklib + BeautifulSoup with chapter boundary awareness
Chunking: RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter (512 tokens, 50 overlap) + timestamp-based for YouTube
Content classifier: metadata-based music vs spoken detection
Store extracted documents in web_pages table (reuse existing schema)
Migration 30A: add source_type, extraction_method columns to web_pages
